editorial_summary: Locals line up for cookies, brownies & ice cream at this popular veteran shop with sidewalk seating.
review_summary: People say this bakery offers delicious cookies, brownies, and ice cream sandwiches. They highlight the reasonable prices and fresh, homemade cookies. They also like the friendly staff and the management's presence.
generative_summary: Busy ice cream sandwich shop and bakery known for cookies in a range of flavors with ice cream fillings.
seating_comfort_notes: No seating available; customers stand or take food to go.
staff_notes: Owner actively present and generous with customers; friendly cashier staff.
price_notes: Cookies at $0.75, ice cream sandwiches and full meals under $10.

name: Ministry of Coffee
address: 1010 Glendon Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90024, USA
editorial_summary: Espresso bar from Sydney with Turkish inspiration serving coffee & food all day.
review_summary:
People say this cafe offers delicious coffee, pastries, and breakfast items, such as croissants with salmon, egg, and avocado, and a Mediterranean plate. They also highlight the cozy, aesthetic ambiance, the friendly staff, and the quick service.

Some reviews mention the staff can be reserved.
generative_summary: Trendy cafe turning out signature coffees and light fare such as pastries, muffins, and sandwiches.
noise_notes: positive and youthful atmosphere with students; atmosphere is perfect for studying but crowded on weekends
seating_comfort_notes: nice indoor and outdoor seating; outdoor patio is peaceful with sunshine yellow umbrellas
best_time_to_visit: weekday mornings or off-peak times to avoid weekend crowds
staff_notes: staff are very kind and friendly; one review mentions staff can be reserved
signature_items: croissant with salmon egg and avocado
food_visible: sandwich with fried egg on sesame seed bun
avocado toast with radishes and sprouts
avocado toast with tomatoes and feta
burger with bacon and egg on sesame seed bun

name: Upside Down
address: 10962 Le Conte Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90024, USA
review_summary: People say this coffee shop offers delicious coffee, lattes, and baked goods. They highlight the donation-based pricing, the friendly and welcoming atmosphere, and the community activities. They also like the kind and talented baristas.
generative_summary: Cozy, donation-based coffee shop also hosting live performances and workshops.
noise_notes: packed with college students, lively atmosphere
seating_comfort_notes: plenty of tables and seats inside
staff_notes: kind, talented, friendly and excellently trained baristas
price_notes: donation-based pricing, set your own price over $1, first order free

name: Cafe Synapse
address: Charles E Young Dr S, Los Angeles, CA 90024, USA
editorial_summary: Gourmet pizzas & salads draw doctors & researchers to this modern campus spot in the Gonda Center.
generative_summary: Pizza, salad and sandwich joint on the UCLA campus for fresh fare and coffee.
seating_comfort_notes: has outdoor seating; very few outlets limits extended stay comfort
staff_notes: speedy and friendly service; quality depends on staff on duty
price_notes: happy hour lunch special $4.99 for half sandwich or salad weekdays 10:30-11:30
food_visible: bagel sandwich with cheese and meat

name: Scrubjay Café
address: 100 Medical Plaza, Los Angeles, CA 90024, USA
staff_notes: quick service, friendly staff, keeps line moving
price_notes: student discount available

name: Habibi Cafe
address: 940 Broxton Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90024, USA

name: Northern Lights Cafe
address: Royce Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90095, USA
editorial_summary: Counter-serve hub in UCLA's North Campus student center for coffee, pastries, sushi & frozen yogurt.
price_notes: $16 for small portions with rice and protein; one reviewer compared unfavorably to McDonald's Happy Meal

name: Anderson Cafe
address: 110 Westwood Plaza, Los Angeles, CA 90077, USA
staff_notes: Mostly students work here and are nice; management inconsistent. Long wait times reported.
price_notes: Cheaper than previous Starbucks. UCLA students can use two swipes for bowl and drink.

name: Bruin Cafe
address: 350 De Neve Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90024, USA
editorial_summary: Informal UCLA dining option featuring coffee, tea, pastries & lunch fare such as salads & wraps.
generative_summary: Casual cafe dishing up wraps and sandwiches, plus smoothies and desserts.
best_time_to_visit: avoid finals week for shorter lines
price_notes: students use Bruin points; some sandwiches over 1000 calories

name: Café 1919
address: 330 De Neve Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90095, USA
staff_notes: quick service praised
price_notes: burger for $9, chips $4

name: 440 25th St
address: 440 25th St, Santa Monica, CA 90402, USA

name: Cafe Belen
address: 11925 Santa Monica Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90025, USA
review_summary: People say this cafe serves delicious huevos rancheros, avocado toast, and French toast. They highlight the reasonable prices and healthy options, such as protein bowls and fresh juices. They also like the friendly and attentive staff.
generative_summary: Cozy cafe offering an all-day menu of breakfast, brunch, salads, coffee, and wine.
seating_comfort_notes: nicely sized tables, cozy ambiance
staff_notes: consistently described as friendly, welcoming, attentive, and smiling
price_notes: reasonable prices, though one reviewer felt food could be slightly better for the price
food_visible: steak with eggs and roasted potatoes
sandwich with lettuce, tomato, onion, and chicken
pasta with shrimp and garlic bread
sliced bread with avocado and egg white omelette
French toast with strawberries and blueberries
drinks_visible: pink beverage in a mason jar

name: Board House Coffee
address: 11901 Santa Monica Blvd #112, Los Angeles, CA 90025, USA
editorial_summary: Small, modern stop offering ample caffeinated beverages, baked goods & breakfast & lunch fare.
review_summary:
People say this coffee shop serves great coffee, iced lattes, and breakfast sandwiches. They also highlight the convenient location, cozy atmosphere, and friendly service.

Other reviews mention the pricing can be misleading.
generative_summary: Easygoing, casual, friendly, no-frills coffee shop serving oat milk lattes, smoothies and avocado toast.
noise_notes: Music is not too loud; workers are mindful of people studying. Good pop music atmosphere.
staff_notes: Workers are mindful and friendly; great customer service mentioned multiple times.
price_notes: Americano charged at $6.50, higher than typical $4.50 average. Misleading pricing noted in summaries.
signature_items: bagel with hashbrowns, chicken and cheese

name: Canter's Deli
address: 12109 Santa Monica Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90025, USA
review_summary:
Diners like this restaurant's delicious cookies, corned beef, and pastrami Reuben, as well as its quick and friendly service.

Other reviews mention the orders can be incorrect and there can be a lack of customer restrooms.
generative_summary: Casual eatery for pastrami sandwiches, matzo ball soup, pancakes and baked goods.
seating_comfort_notes: Original location has spacious booths; Santa Monica location described as lacking charm
best_time_to_visit: Friday or Saturday evenings for 24-hour service; any time of day
staff_notes: Multiple reviewers praised quick and friendly service; Maria mentioned as 15-year veteran who is warm and attentive
price_notes: Expensive but reviewers note good quality meat; one reviewer felt swindled by pricing
food_visible: grilled cheese sandwich with macaroni and bacon

address: 12243 Santa Monica Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90025, USA
staff_notes: Owner Adi is known for treating customers like family and being knowledgeable and helpful.

bowl with banana slices, goji berries, pumpkin seeds, and granola
